name: Vegetarian Ginger Snaps
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the shortening until fluffy.
2. Add sugar and continue to beat until well combined.
3. Gradually add the remaining ingredients, one at a time, beating after each addition.
4. Once all ingredients are thoroughly mixed, wrap the dough in waxed paper and refrigerate for 1 hour to make it easier to handle.
5. On a floured surface, roll out the dough until it is about 1/8 inch thick.
6. Use a cookie cutter to cut into cookies and place them on a baking sheet.
7. Bake at 275°F for 8 to 10 minutes.
8. Allow to cool for a couple of minutes on the sheet before transferring to a wire rack to cool further.
